keyValues.price.applier.markup.name: Markup
keyValues.price.applier.markup.description: Applies a markup to the price according to the configured markup ranges.
keyValues.price.applier.price.rounding.name: Price rounding
keyValues.price.applier.price.rounding.description: Rounds the price according to the configured price rounding step.
keyValues.price.applier.minimum.supplier.price.des: Raises the price to the minimum supplier offer price when market data is available.
keyValues.price.applier.uniqueness.additional.mark: Applies an additional markup when the product has no market offers.
keyValues.price.applier.name.max.length: Price applier name must not exceed 128 characters.
keyValues.price.applier.order.duplicate: Another enabled price applier already uses this order.
keyValues.price.applier.dsl.logic.required: DSL logic is required for a dynamic price applier.
keyValues.price.applier.dsl.logic.invalid: DSL logic must be a valid JSON Logic rule that returns a non-negative decimal price.
keyValues.price.applier.usage.not.supported: The price applier does not support the specified usage.
keyValues.price.applier.system.name.conflict: A price applier with this system name already exists with a different type.
keyValues.price.applier.system.name.required: Price applier system name is required.
keyValues.price.applier.local.cannot.be.deleted: A local price applier cannot be deleted; it can only be disabled.
keyValues.price.applier.usage.duplicate: Price applier usage values must be unique.
keyValues.pricing.setting.name: Pricing settings
keyValues.pricing.setting.description: Controls price calculation, markup selection, offer lifetime, and supplier delivery scoring.
keyValues.pricing.setting.input.invalid: Invalid pricing settings data was provided.
keyValues.pricing.setting.selected.markup.id.name: Selected markup group
keyValues.pricing.setting.selected.markup.id.descr: Markup group used for price calculation. Leave empty to use the latest auto-generated markup group.
keyValues.pricing.setting.default.markup.name: Default markup
keyValues.pricing.setting.default.markup.descripti: Markup value used when no configured markup range matches the base price.
keyValues.pricing.setting.offer.ttl.name: Offer lifetime
keyValues.pricing.setting.offer.ttl.description: Time period during which cached supplier offers remain valid.
keyValues.pricing.setting.price.rounding.step.name: Price rounding step
keyValues.pricing.setting.price.rounding.step.desc: Step used to round calculated prices.
keyValues.pricing.setting.delivery.day.penalty.des: Cost penalty added per delivery day when supplier offers are scored.
Additional markup applied to products that have no comparable market offers.
keyValues.lrt.price.candidate.calculation.name: Price candidate calculation
keyValues.lrt.price.candidate.calculation.descript: Calculates and stores price candidates for the selected product and storage.
Product for which price candidates should be calculated.
Storage for which price candidates should be calculated.
keyValues.lrt.invalidate.stale.price.options.name: Invalidate stale price options
keyValues.lrt.invalidate.stale.price.options.descr: Removes price options calculated with an outdated pricing configuration and enqueues recalculation jobs.
